\tzpentry{ID5846}{Toroidal Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5846 introduces Toroidal Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi_{toroid}(r,\theta,\phi) = \frac{B_0 R_0}{r} \hat{\boldsymbol{\phi}} + B_p(r) \hat{\boldsymbol{\theta}} \end{equation}
